title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Easyday

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at Easyday
jsonLd.description:
Easyday invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Ludhiana location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Easyday:
Easyday is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday!
